style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift lazily upward like powdered stardust, each particle refracting soft pastel hues of pink and lavender. A delicate petal-shaped aura pulses gently around Dratini's body in a swirling, translucent halo of iridescent light, casting a warm amber glow that bathes the scene in a serene, dreamlike ambiance. The faint musical note vibrations manifest as shimmering, translucent ripples in the air, blending seamlessly with the ethereal glow. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
